Pre-Season Scouting Notes
#1 · Flabiano9
Top of both boards — best draft strength in the league and the No. 1 power rank, built on a four-man Newcastle stack.
0.675 strength NEW-4 concentration
#2 · cstoney20
Second in draft strength in his first DPL season, leaning on a Brentford trio.
0.655 strength BRF-3 concentration
#3 · brendog2814
Fourth-best draft with a strong forward line; power rank 3 on the strength of the attack.
0.629 strength CHE-2 concentration
#4 · bjennings28
Mid-pack draft strength but ranked 4th — trusted to outperform the board.
0.622 strength NOT-2 concentration
#5 · rmeernst
Third-strongest draft on paper, slotted 5th in the power rank.
0.633 strength LIV-2 concentration
#6 · willmoran
Defending 31–7 champion ranked 6th despite the 9th-rated draft — reputation carrying the ranking.
0.593 strength NOT-3 concentration
#7 · Noahvillasana17
Last season's runner-up gets rank 7 with only the 10th-rated draft.
0.581 strength WHU-2 concentration
#8 · jacklynch213
Four Palace players and the 7th-rated draft.
0.614 strength CRY-4 concentration
#9 · erozier
Ranked 9th pre-season with an 8th-rated draft built on a City core — then won the whole thing.
0.611 strength MCI-3 concentration
#10 · JordiCarb
The board's biggest snub — 5th-best draft strength but ranked 10th; heaviest single-club bet with five Arsenal players.
0.626 strength ARS-5 concentration
#11 · benditlikebergvall
Weakest draft strength in the league; ranked 11th.
0.561 strength CRY-3 concentration
#12 · skoeiboy
11th in draft strength, 12th in the power rank.
0.567 strength WHU-3 concentration
